extraction.one_line_summary: POGAČAR won Stage 20 sprint finish after YATES Adam paced him, beating VINGEGAARD for time bonuses in final mountain stage
tactical_patterns: YATES Adam sacrificed personal GC position by leading out POGAČAR in final sprint despite sitting third overall.
VINGEGAARD allowed POGAČAR inside line on final corner turn into headwind, losing crucial time bonus and sprint.
RODRIGUEZ Carlos crash on first ascent cost him podium position despite PIDCOCK pacing work to limit losses.

rider_signals.YATES Adam: positive: Worked as domestique for POGAČAR in final kilometer despite protecting own third place GC, revealing UAE prioritized time bonuses over Adam's podium position
rider_signals.YATES Simon: positive: Fourth place finish suggests stronger climbing than twin brother Adam who sacrificed for team tactics
rider_signals.RODRIGUEZ Carlos: negative: Crash on first climb dropped him from podium contention despite having PIDCOCK support to limit damage
rider_signals.VINGEGAARD Jonas: negative: Gave POGAČAR inside line on final corner into headwind, tactical error cost time bonus in sprint finish
rider_signals.PIDCOCK Tom: positive: Paced RODRIGUEZ after crash to minimize GC losses, effective damage control domestique work
